case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. VINCENT FONTELA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,350.40 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT FONTELA, VINCENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS PAID IN FULL. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VINCENT FONTELA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.97) SERVED FEB-21-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FONTELA, VINCENT
ORDER RE: DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
